text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, we'll be taking on the Sprinters Stakes for
the second time.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O, Yamanin Zephyr... There are
some strong contenders in the lineup this year!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Hold on a sec! You forgot about Nishino Flower!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! Speaking of, she's had a new game face
on recently that really speaks to her growth.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait for her to show us how much further
she's come!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Can you say the stuff you always tell me before a
race, please?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Can I ask you for a selfish favor?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to go bloom into a huge flower, and
when I come back...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'd like you to praise me and tell me I'm beautiful!
